name: Contract Diff
description: A side-by-side contract comparison view with synchronized scrolling, inline change markers, addition and deletion highlighting, and a clause navigation sidebar.

split.description: Two document panes arranged side by side with synchronized scrolling and corresponding change markers aligned horizontally across both panes

inline.description: Single unified column showing deletions struck through and additions highlighted inline for a continuous reading-flow comparison

summary.description: Changes-only list view enumerating every insertion, deletion, and modification as a compact review checklist without full document context

visual_brief: Two document panes rendered as scrollable text surfaces positioned side by side. Left pane shows the original version, right pane shows the revised. Both use a serif document font at comfortable reading size with generous line-height. Addition text appears with a pale green (#DCFCE7) background and green underline. Deletion text shows with pale red (#FEE2E2) background and strikethrough. Both panes share a synchronized vertical scroll — scrolling one scrolls the other. A gutter between the panes contains connecting lines and change markers (small colored chevrons: green for add, red for delete, amber for modify) linking related changes across panes. A left-docked clause navigation sidebar lists all changed sections by clause number with change-type icons, clickable for jump-to navigation. Top header shows aggregate change count ('37 changes: 18 additions, 12 deletions, 7 modifications').

layout_hints.note: Document panes must use serif font-family. Preserve legal document whitespace/indentation. Sync scroll is mandatory in split preset.
layout_hints.change_semantics: Additions always green, deletions always red, modifications always amber. Do not invert.

slots.diff-pane: Scrollable document pane rendering contract text with inline change highlights. Repeats twice in split preset.
slots.change-marker: Small colored chevron or bar in the pane gutter indicating a change at that line position.
slots.addition-text: Inline text span with green background and underline decoration wrapping added content.
slots.deletion-text: Inline text span with red background and strikethrough wrapping removed content.
slots.clause-nav: Left-docked sidebar list of clauses containing changes, with type icons and jump links.
slots.change-count: Top header badge showing aggregate counts of additions, deletions, and modifications.

responsive.mobile: Split preset collapses to inline preset automatically. Clause nav becomes slide-out drawer.
responsive.tablet: Split retained with narrower panes. Clause nav collapses to icon strip.

ambient.sync-indicator: subtle gutter-line glow pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite

composition.ContractDiff: Section(d-section) > [ChangeCount(header) + ClauseNav(sidebar) + DiffPane[](d-surface) > [LineNumber + ChangeMarker + [AdditionText | DeletionText | NormalText]]]
